summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Way2News app new features (iteration 2). All major new functionality working correctly including dark mode, swipe reader, video news integration, WhatsApp sharing, and enhanced navigation.

minor_bugs.issue: Down navigation button disabled when only one article available
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot test full swipe functionality with limited test data
minor_bugs.workaround: Add more test articles to validate complete swipe navigation

passed_tests: Dark mode toggle in header works and persists across page reloads
Bottom navigation displays all 5 tabs (Home, Swipe, Videos, Saved, Admin)
Navigation between all tabs works correctly
Swipe Reader page loads at /swipe with full-screen TikTok-style display
WhatsApp share button on news cards opens proper share dialog with encoded content
WhatsApp share functionality also works in Swipe Reader mode
Video News page displays Kaizer Nigha channel banner with proper branding
Video thumbnails (6 videos) load correctly with Telugu titles
Video player modal opens YouTube embed with autoplay functionality
Video modal closes correctly with close button
Refresh videos button works on Video News page
Dark mode applies consistently to all pages (Home, Videos, Saved, Admin)
Language toggle continues to work properly in dark mode
Page content switches correctly between English and Telugu
Save/bookmark functionality works in both regular cards and swipe reader
Admin page loads correctly and supports dark mode
